analyzer.semantic_method: Deterministic exhaustive enumeration of the frozen finite Boolean modules and query-local projections, with complete retained assignments for models, counterexamples, and witnesses.
analyzer.execution_guard: Refuses any manifest that is not FROZEN, lacks no-prior-result-access attestation, fails exact study/subject/profile identity checks, or has a mismatched immutable artifact digest.
analyzer.write_policy: Creates one new JSON output with exclusive-create mode; refuses overwrite.

integrity_tools.schema_validator: jsonschema 4.25.1 from the repository development environment; validation is not part of the semantic analyzer

verification_boundary: Successful parsing, compilation, schema validation, execution, exhaustive enumeration, or absence of a bounded counterexample does not validate all FMO-0.1. The separately retained semantic-validity adjudication is mandatory and can invalidate any machine analysis.
architecture_boundary: This study-local tool provenance selects no model, embedding, storage, retrieval, vendor, application schema, continuous service, or general LCMRP implementation architecture.
